sequence: Read real character timing from the provider response.
Render the final Remotion composition from the aligned subtitle source.
hard_rules: Do not ship final subtitle timing from hand-estimated frames when aligned audio exists.
If voiceover text changes, regenerate audio and rebuild the subtitle timeline.
Keep subtitle text source identical to voiceover_units text except for line breaks.

fallback.when_alignment_unavailable: Use estimated_after_audio_duration_fit and mark the timeline explicitly as non-final.
